# fixtures/graphql

GraphQL fixture file for `.scm` query tests.

- `sample.graphql` — defines `User`, `Post` types, `Node`/`Timestamped` interfaces, `UserRole` enum, `SearchResult` union, `CreateUserInput`/`UpdatePostInput` inputs, `DateTime`/`UUID` scalars, and `Query`/`Mutation` operation types. Includes `"""description"""` strings and `#` comments above selected definitions to exercise `graphql.decorations.scm`.
